creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
Etk_Server allows Etk applications to be programmed using almost any
language. The user interacts with a fifo that allows for the sending of
commands, receiving of output, and event programming.

Author:	Hisham 'CodeWarrior' Mardambey <hisham.mardambey@gmail.com>
WWW:	http://www.enlightenment.org/

Note: this depends on x11-toolkits/etk PR
